title: Spelling
body:
This PR corrects misspellings identified by the [check-spelling action](https://github.com/marketplace/actions/check-spelling).

The misspellings have been reported at https://github.com/jsoref/skopeo/commit/f3fde540f2211a3256f067d907d3671ceb53e49f#commitcomment-45289138

The action reports that the changes in this PR would make it happy: https://github.com/jsoref/skopeo/commit/2f22e380de9e9525b95973c304a0c21b981e29c8

Note: this PR does not include the action. If you're interested in running a spell check on every PR and push, that can be offered separately.
